name: Progres with Grand Marnier IV (Assembly)
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SYRUP-----------------------------------
4 oz Water 4 oz Sugar
-------------------------------CREME NOISETTE-------------------------------
1/4 x Buttercream 1 oz Almond paste
------------------------------CHOCOLATE CREAM------------------------------
3/4 x Buttercream 12 oz Chocolate, semi-sweet
Syrup:
======
In a small saucepan, bring the water and sugar to a boil. Turn off heat and cool in refrigerator. Add Grand Marnier to cooled syrup and reserve.
Creme Noisette:
===============
Put hazelnut paste and Kirsch into a bowl and mix with spatula. Add 4 ounces of buttercream and blend well. Refrigerate for 5 minutes.
Chocolate Cream:
================
Melt the chocolate, then cool. Add half of the chocolate to the buttercream. Mix well, then add remainder of the chocolate (must be done in steps or cream will break). Refrigerate.
Assembly:
=========
Remove biscuit from refrigerator and cut it to shape of mold. Place bottom biscuit into mold and brush with syrup. Spread layer of creme noisette on top of syrup. Refrigerate for 2 minutes.
Add a layer of mousse, then place top biscuit on mousse. Brush with syrup again, then spread with layer of chocolate cream. Freeze for 5 - 30 minutes.
Pipe layer of chocolate cream on top. Unmold and serve on tray with garnish of sugar and real flowers.
